label: Inf_mono
evidence: Reynolds et al. (2021) use 'Inf. = inflammatory' as an abbreviation key in the figure legend for Fig. 3 UMAP of mononuclear phagocytes. The UMAP figure legend states: 'LC = Langerhans cell, DC = dendritic cell, Mig. = migratory, Mac = macrophage, Mono mac = monocyte derived macrophage, MoDC = monocyte derived dendritic cell, inf. = inflammatory'. The 'Inf. mono' label refers to the inflammatory monocyte state distinguished from classical monocytes by its inflammatory activation signature.
